content.cn_text: 今天，我们将讨论阿德维塔龟，一个因其独特特征而备受关注的物种
content.en_text: Today, we will discuss the Advaita Turtle, a species that has drawn significant attention

content.cn_text: 以及其面临的保护挑战。
content.en_text: due to its unique characteristics and conservation challenges.

content.cn_text: 这些海龟通常生活在淡水溪流中，它们在缓慢流动的水域中茁壮成长。
content.en_text: These turtles are typically found in streams of freshwater where they thrive in slow-moving

content.cn_text: 水。
content.en_text: water.

content.cn_text: 它们偏好的环境是水草丰茂的浅水区，提供
content.en_text: Their preferred environment consists of shallow areas with abundant vegetation, offering

content.cn_text: 食物和庇护所。
content.en_text: both food and shelter.

content.cn_text: 与其他一些海龟不同，它们不适应深水或快速流动的河流。
content.en_text: Unlike some other turtles, they are not well adapted to deep or fast-moving rivers.

content.cn_text: 阿德维塔龟最显著的特征之一是它的壳。
content.en_text: One of the most distinguishing features of the Advaita Turtle is its shell.

content.cn_text: 与那些具有坚韧保护性外层的物种不同，这种海龟的壳异常脆弱。
content.en_text: Unlike species with tough protective outer layers, this turtle's shell is unusually fragile.

content.cn_text: 这使得它们极易受到捕食者和环境破坏的影响。
content.en_text: This makes it highly vulnerable to predators and environmental damage.

content.cn_text: 因此，它们倾向于长时间隐藏，尽可能避免直接威胁。
content.en_text: As a result, they tend to stay hidden for long periods, avoiding direct threats whenever

content.cn_text: 可能。
content.en_text: possible.

content.cn_text: 另一个关键特征是它们强壮的爪子，具有多种用途。
content.en_text: Another key characteristic is their strong claws, which serve multiple purposes.

content.cn_text: 这些海龟用它们的爪子在柔软的河床中挖洞，以便它们
content.en_text: These turtles use their claws for digging burrows in soft riverbeds, allowing them to

content.cn_text: 安全地躲藏起来休息。
content.en_text: rest safely out of sight.

content.cn_text: 此外，它们的爪子还帮助它们觅食，它们通过刮开泥土和植被来
content.en_text: Additionally, their claws help them in foraging as they scrape through mud and vegetation

content.cn_text: 发现食物来源。
content.en_text: to uncover food sources.

content.cn_text: 说到饮食，阿德维塔龟是杂食动物，这意味着它们既吃植物也吃动物
content.en_text: Speaking of diet, Advaita turtles are omnivorous, meaning they consume both plant and animal

content.cn_text: 物质。
content.en_text: matter.

content.cn_text: 虽然它们经常以昆虫和水生植物为食，但它们也 known to eat mushrooms
content.en_text: While they often feed on insects and aquatic plants, they are also known to eat mushrooms
that grow near the water's edge. that grow near the water's edge.

content.cn_text: 这些真菌提供必需的营养，有助于它们的生长和整体健康。
content.en_text: These fungi provide essential nutrients that contribute to their growth and overall health.

content.cn_text: 尽管适应能力强，阿德维塔龟仍面临重大风险。
content.en_text: Despite their adaptability, Advaita turtles face significant risks.

content.cn_text: 由于多种环境挑战，它们的种群目前正面临严峻威胁。
content.en_text: Their population is currently under a critical threat due to several environmental challenges.

content.cn_text: 森林砍伐和水污染摧毁了许多它们的自然栖息地，使得
content.en_text: Deforestation and water pollution have destroyed many of their natural habitats, making it

content.cn_text: 它们越来越难以找到安全的筑巢区。
content.en_text: increasingly difficult for them to find safe nesting areas.

content.cn_text: 它们面临的最大危险之一来自家养狗。
content.en_text: One of the greatest dangers they face comes from domestic dogs.

content.cn_text: 这些动物经常干扰筑巢地点，捕食幼龟，使它们没有机会
content.en_text: These animals often disturb nesting sites, praying on young turtles before they have a chance

content.cn_text: 正常发育。
content.en_text: to develop properly.

content.cn_text: 保护工作已尝试通过在筑巢区周围设置保护屏障来减少这些袭击。
content.en_text: Conservation efforts have attempted to reduce these attacks by setting up protective barriers

content.cn_text: 周围没有筑巢区。
content.en_text: around no nesting areas.

content.cn_text: 影响它们生存的另一个问题是气候变化。
content.en_text: Another issue impacting their survival is climate change.

content.cn_text: 气温上升和森林砍伐导致它们许多传统栖息地失去水分，
content.en_text: Rising temperatures and deforestation have led to a loss of moisture in many of their

content.cn_text: 传统栖息地。
content.en_text: traditional habitats.

content.cn_text: 结果，一些曾经支持这些海龟的区域现在变得干燥，迫使它们
content.en_text: As a result, some areas that once supported these turtles have now become dry, forcing

content.cn_text: 迁移以寻找更好的条件。
content.en_text: them to migrate in search of better conditions.

content.cn_text: 不幸的是，许多海龟未能熬过这些漫长的旅程。
content.en_text: Unfortunately, many turtles do not survive these long journeys.

content.cn_text: 为了应对这些挑战，环保人士实施了物种迁地项目。
content.en_text: To combat these challenges, conservationists have implemented species relocation programs.

content.cn_text: 这些举措涉及将海龟从高风险区域转移到更安全、受保护的区域，
content.en_text: These initiatives involve moving turtles from high-risk zones to safer, protected areas

content.cn_text: 在那里它们可以在没有外部威胁的情况下茁壮成长。
content.en_text: where they can thrive without external threats.

content.cn_text: 在某些情况下，迁地海龟需要创新的解决方案。
content.en_text: In some cases, relocating turtles has required creative solutions.

content.cn_text: 由于某些地区的崎岖地形，研究人员曾使用大象来帮助
content.en_text: Due to the difficult terrain in certain regions, researchers have used an elephant to help

content.cn_text: 长途运输海龟。
content.en_text: transport turtles across long distances.

content.cn_text: 这已被证明是确保它们安全迁地的有效方法。
content.en_text: This has proven to be an effective method for ensuring their safe relocation.

content.cn_text: 最后，社区参与在保护工作中扮演着关键角色。
content.en_text: Finally, community involvement plays a crucial role in conservation efforts.

content.cn_text: 当地居民正在接受专门的培训，学习如何保护和等待海龟
content.en_text: Local populations are now receiving specialized training on how to protect and await turtles

content.cn_text: 及其栖息地。
content.en_text: and their habitats.

content.cn_text: 通过教育人们这些海龟的重要性，环保人士希望创造
content.en_text: By educating people on the importance of these turtles, conservationists hope to create

content.cn_text: 能够保障它们未来的长期解决方案。
content.en_text: long-term solutions that will secure their future.

groups.desc:

Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 31–40

items.title: Adwaita turtles primarily live in freshwater 31. __________.
Their shells are extremely 32. __________, making them vulnerable to predators.
They use their 33. __________ to dig into soft riverbeds and search for food.
One of the foods in their diet includes 34. __________ that grow near water.
The survival of Adwaita turtles is under a 35. __________ threat due to environmental changes.
One of the biggest threats to Adwaita turtles comes from 36. __________, which prey on them.
Their habitat is becoming 37. __________ due to climate change, making it harder for them to nest.
Conservationists are using species 38. __________ programs to move turtles to safer locations.
In some cases, turtles are transported with the help of an 39. __________.
Local communities are receiving 40. __________ to help protect the turtles and their habitat.

groups.source_collect:
Complete the note below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
Adwaita Turtles
Habitat and Characteristics
• Adwaita turtles primarily live in freshwater $31$.
• Their shells are extremely $32$, making them vulnerable to predators.
• They use their $33$ to dig into soft riverbeds and search for food.
• One of the foods in their diet includes $34$ that grow near water.
Threats and Conservation Status
• The survival of Adwaita turtles is under a $35$ threat due to environmental changes.
• One of the biggest threats to Adwaita turtles comes from $36$, which prey on them.
• Their habitat is becoming $37$ due to climate change, making it harder for them to nest.
Conservation Efforts and Future Plans
• Conservationists are using species $38$ programs to move turtles to safer locations.
• In some cases, turtles are transported with the help of an $39$.
• Local communities are receiving $40$ to help protect the turtles and their habitat.
